text_block_list.text:
Buena Vista has entered her Senior year.
Hoping that this year would be another
successful one, the two of us planned to visit
a shrine together for the New Year.
Or at least, that was the plan.

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You're both back already? Weren't you
going to visit the shrine?

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Isn't that Buena Vista!? Wow, it's really
her!

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: Huh!? Buena!? Waaah, she's so cute!!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hello! Happy New Ye—

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text:
"That's Buena Vista!" "Where!?"
"I watched your race!"
"Can I get a picture!?"
"Oh my gosh!" "Buenaaa!!!"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Eep…!?

Before we knew it, she'd been completely
surrounded by fans, and we ended up heading
back to avoid causing a commotion.

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, that must've been quite the ordeal.
Buena's incredibly popular right now, after
all…
She wasn't exaggerating. Buena Vista's popularity had already grown beyond the world of racing. At this point, she could be described as… the Heroine of the Era.

text_block_list.name: Talk Show Host
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the midday news! And our first
topic today is… this!

text_block_list.name: Talk Show Host
text_block_list.text:
Taking the internet by storm! Who is this 
"always giving her best" horsegirl everyone's
talking about?

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
We've come to the renowned horsegirl
training school, Tracen Academy! And the
person we'd like to introduce today is… ah,
there she is!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: Buena Vistaaa!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yes! Um…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: You're watching Midday Talks! Nice to meet you everyone, I'm Buena Vista! Thank you for having me today!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Here she is, Buena Vista! Her popularity
exploded after her performance in one of
Japan's biggest races, the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: For a time, she completely dominated Umatter's trending topics! She truly is… the Heroine of the Era!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Today, we'll be taking a special look at the
daily life of this popular horsegirl♪

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
That show was fun, wasn't it!? Seeing
<username> on there too was a nice surprise.
choice_data_list: I refused at first, but Buena insisted…

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
That show was fun, wasn't it!? Seeing
<username> on there too was a nice surprise.
choice_data_list: I refused at first, but Buena insisted…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
If they're going to take a closer look at my
daily life, then having my trainer there is
essential, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Besides… I feel more confident when you're
with me. Though I never imagined I'd end up
chatting on a variety show of all things…

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
They're practically treating you like a celebrity
now. I have it set to record anything with your
name on it, but lately I can't keep up with all
of it.

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
…Hey, are you sure you're okay with that?
Your main focus is racing. You don't have to
force yourself to appear in the media…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine! It's actually been fun getting to try
new things.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
And besides, it means people want to see me.
I'd like to answer those expectations as much
as I can!
choice_data_list: (It's amazing that that's her true feeling…)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, I've got my trainer with me
too. Hehe, reassuring, isn't it～?

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's true, but… <username> has
responsibilities as a trainer too…
choice_data_list: It's my job to support what Buena wants to do…

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's true, but… <username> has
responsibilities as a trainer too…
choice_data_list: It's my job to support what Buena wants to do…

text_block_list.text:
There are, in fact, trainers who also act as
managers for their horsegirls. Whether I can
handle that much remains to be seen, but…
choice_data_list: For Buena's sake, I'll do whatever I can.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Trainer…

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hehe… All right, all right. I guess I was
worrying for nothing. Now then, weren't you
headed to the shrine? I don't think there will
be anyone if you go the the one nearby.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: She's right, there's nobody here…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it… This is where we used
to play hide-and-seek because nobody would
ever come here.
choice_data_list: …Didn't we end up not doing much hiding at all?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Really? Though now that you mention
it…
choice_data_list: You'd get scared and come out right away.
You'd get scared and come out right away.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …! L-Let's stop talking about that, okay!?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Come on, let's just pray! Over here, over here!

Standing shoulder to shoulder with Buena
Vista, I quietly press my hands together.
The thing I pray for is…
choice_data_list: May Buena get plenty of sleep.
May Buena experience many new things.

text_block_list.text:
She's only going to get busier from here on
out. When that happens, the most important
thing will be… sleep. I pray that she'll be able
to rest properly whenever she needs it.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: (Ah, Trainer… he looks so serious…)

Even tougher battles await Buena Vista in the
future. I pray that she'll continue to shine as
brightly as ever when those days come.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: (Ah, Trainer… he looks so serious…)

From media appearances onward, countless
new experiences await her. I pray they'll
continue to become valuable lessons for her
future.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: (Ah, Trainer… he looks so serious…)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(He's probably thinking about me right now.
In that case, I too should…)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(May you stay healthy this year too. And may
we find our breathtaking view.)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(I still don't know what kind of view it'll be…
But I hope we can reach it together—!)

After finishing our shrine visit and heading
back toward the academy… we take a route
with fewer people just to be safe. Then…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ah! Nakayamaaa!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: …Huh? Oi, what're you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
…Don't tell me you got lost again. Even with
your trainer right beside you?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Your little lady here gets lost way too easily.
Maybe hold her hand or something.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
It's okay! The world's full of kind people like
you, Nakayama!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I didn't get lost today! Um… there
were just a few complications.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Complications, huh… ah.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Midday Talks, was it? Being popular sure sounds rough.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You watched it? That makes me really
happy!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
If the opportunity ever comes up, I'd love for
you to be on the show too! The staff were all
wonderful people!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
…Unlike you, I finished twelfth in the Kikuka
Sho. Nobody's inviting me onto TV.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Though if I were to eat someone like you… that might be a different story.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Keep running the big races in your Senior
year… for my sake too. Anyway, Happy New
Year.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Do you think she's going to eat me? Like, chomp.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, maybe I should! Chomp! Let's give it our all this year too!
